title: geum montanum
intro: Geum montanum, also known as Avens, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The roots and flowers of Geum montanum have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Geum montanum have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Geum montanum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as an ingredient in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to support skin health and wound healing.
